revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Kaya-no-in]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو تایشی]][[fr:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[id:Kaya-no-in]][[ja:藤原泰子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[th:ฟูจิวาระ โนะ ยาซูโกะ]][[vi:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[zh:藤原泰子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1095|death_date={{death date|1156|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|qid=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|qid=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Toba|qid=Q349284}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Tadazane|qid=Q718939}}|mother={{ill|Minamoto no Shishi|qid=Q10395954}}|family={{ill|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|qid=Q748}}|native_name=藤原泰子|given_name={{ill|Yasuko|qid=Q8050015}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{family name hatnote|Fujiwara|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|藤原泰子|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Fujiwara no Yasuko |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = 1134–1139 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = |mother = |birth_date = 1095 |birth_place = |death_date = {{death year and age|1156|1095}} |death_place = |burial_date = |burial_place = |}}
'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]]. She was the consort of [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her [[:en:Dharma name|Dharma name]] upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
==Notes== {{reflist}}
==External links== * http://www.guide2womenleaders.com/japan_heads.htm {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Nariko|Fujiwara no Nariko]] | years=1134–1139}} {{s-end}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Kaya-no-in]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو تایشی]][[fr:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[id:Kaya-no-in]][[ja:藤原泰子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[th:ฟูจิวาระ โนะ ยาซูโกะ]][[vi:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[zh:藤原泰子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1095|death_date={{death date|1156|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|WD=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Toba|WD=Q349284}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Tadazane|WD=Q718939}}|mother={{ill|Minamoto no Shishi|WD=Q10395954}}|family={{ill|Imperial House of Japan|WD=Q909452}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|WD=Q748}}|native_name=藤原泰子|given_name={{ill|Yasuko|WD=Q8050015}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{family name hatnote|Fujiwara|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|藤原泰子|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Fujiwara no Yasuko |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = 1134–1139 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = |mother = |birth_date = 1095 |birth_place = |death_date = {{death year and age|1156|1095}} |death_place = |burial_date = |burial_place = |}}
'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]]. She was the consort of [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her [[:en:Dharma name|Dharma name]] upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
==Notes== {{reflist}}
==External links== * http://www.guide2womenleaders.com/japan_heads.htm {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Nariko|Fujiwara no Nariko]] | years=1134–1139}} {{s-end}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Kaya-no-in]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو تایشی]][[fr:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[id:Kaya-no-in]][[ja:藤原泰子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[th:ฟูจิวาระ โนะ ยาซูโกะ]][[vi:Fujiwara no Yasuko]][[zh:藤原泰子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1095|death_date={{death date|1156|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|WD=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Toba|WD=Q349284}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Tadazane|WD=Q718939}}|mother={{ill|Minamoto no Shishi|WD=Q10395954}}|family={{ill|Imperial House of Japan|WD=Q909452}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|WD=Q748}}|native_name=藤原泰子|given_name={{ill|Yasuko|WD=Q8050015}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4168118]] Wikidata name: Fujiwara no Yasuko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{family name hatnote|Fujiwara|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|藤原泰子|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Fujiwara no Yasuko |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = 1134–1139 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = |mother = |birth_date = 1095 |birth_place = |death_date = {{death year and age|1156|1095}} |death_place = |burial_date = |burial_place = |}}
'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]]. She was the consort of [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her [[:en:Dharma name|Dharma name]] upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
==Notes== {{reflist}}
==External links== * http://www.guide2womenleaders.com/japan_heads.htm {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Nariko|Fujiwara no Nariko]] | years=1134–1139}} {{s-end}}

'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]]. She was the consort of [[:en:Emperor Toba|Emperor Toba]] of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her [[:en:Dharma name|Dharma name]] upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
==Notes== {{reflist}}
==External links== * http://www.guide2womenleaders.com/japan_heads.htm {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Nariko|Fujiwara no Nariko]] | years=1134–1139}} {{s-end}}

'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}}. She was the consort of {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|WD=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba}} of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her {{ill|Dharma name|en|Dharma name|WD=Q1543672|lt=Dharma name}} upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
==Notes== {{reflist}}
==External links== * http://www.guide2womenleaders.com/japan_heads.htm {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]] | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan}} | after={{ill|Fujiwara no Nariko|en|Fujiwara no Nariko|WD=Q5507535|lt=Fujiwara no Nariko}} | years=1134–1139}} {{s-end}}

'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}}. She was the consort of {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|WD=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba}} of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her {{ill|Dharma name|en|Dharma name|WD=Q1543672|lt=Dharma name}} upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).

==Notes==

'''Fujiwara no Taishi''' (藤原 泰子, also read '''Fujiwara no Yasuko'''; 1095–1156) was an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}}. She was the consort of {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|WD=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} of Japan. Her birth name was '''Fujiwara no Kunshi''' (藤原 勲子), her ''[[ingō]]'' was '''Kaya-no-in''' (高陽院) and her {{ill|Dharma name|en|Dharma name|WD=Q1543672|lt=Dharma name|1=Dharma name}} upon [[:en:bhikkuni|entering religious orders]] in 1141 was '''Shōjōri''' (清浄理).
